answers: Dreams occur during REM sleep. Common theories: memory processing, emotional regulation, and problem solving.
Common dreams: falling (anxiety), flying (freedom), teeth falling out (insecurity), being chased (avoidance).
Dream interpretation is subjective — what symbols mean depends on your personal associations and current life situation.
Shopno ki: ghumanor somoy brain events process kore. Common shopno: pora, udte para, tara kora.
